docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PUENTE RAMON

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DISCOTECA HABANA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PUENTE RAMON $341.32 PRINCIPAL, $27.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $368.82, SETTLEMENT REACHED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $341.32 FILED BY DISCOTECA HABANA AS TO DEFENDANT PUENTE RAMON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-22-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
